title: elymus elymoides var. hordeoides
intro: Elymus elymoides var. hordeoides, also known as slim spikerush, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elymus elymoides var. hordeoides include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, or it can be used in salves and ointments to apply topically for wound care and skin issues.
